test-method.name: verifyLogin
test-method.description: Verify user can log in with valid credentials

test-method.name: VerifyBiddingRound1NAFED
test-method.description: Verify Bidder can Bid in Auction Round 1 NAFED

test-method.name: verifyBidderLogin
test-method.description: Verify Bidder can login with valid Credentials
